prose:

**Most electrophilic site:** Atom 3 (C, ortho to amino group), f⁺ = 2.2975867 — benzene carbon most susceptible to nucleophilic attack.

**Most nucleophilic site:** Atom 1 (N, amino nitrogen), f⁻ = 0.20452359 — primary site for electrophilic attack.

**Dual descriptor (Δf = f⁺ − f⁻):** Atom 3 shows Δf = 2.2310153 (electrophilic character); Atom 1 shows Δf = 1.4651392 (electron-rich). Full per-atom indices reported in the main results above.

**Software:** PySCF; command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpj9w3qyis/live.json`
